changelog: Fixed a bug where the plugin had no visible way to open it after install: the sidebar icon used an invalid icon class (rendered blank), pages/floating button were mounted to document.body instead of Acode's actual app root, and command registration only tried a module that isn't always present. Added a guaranteed floating launch button, a real Material Icons sidebar icon, mounting via Acode's app shell root, and command registration via Ace's editor command manager as well as the commands module. Also added a new logo/icon and general UI polish.
